text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Woooooo! My drive to win is through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, my parents called to give me some
support and now I'm feeling super motivated!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm not the same old ordinary me today. I'll show you a different kind of ordinary!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's do it! Ei, ei, mun!
